name: Mino Cinelu
abstract: Mino Cinélu (born 10 March 1957) is a French musician. He plays multiple instruments.

about_quotes.speaker: Christian McBride
about_quotes.evidence: Mino Cinelu is playing percussion, and I just thought that “Little Sunflower” would be a perfect song to lend itself for bass and percussion
about_quotes.doc_title: Christian McBride interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: There’s a record, for instance, a duo record I did with Mino Cinelu, called Swamp Sally.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
